verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Under His wings I am safely abiding; Though the night deepens and tempests are wild, Still I can trust Him, I know He will keep me; He has redeemed me, And I am His child.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Under His wings, under His wings, Who from His love can sever? Under His wings my soul shall abide, Safely abide forever.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Under His wings, What a refuge in sorrow! How the heart yearningly Turns to His rest! Often when earth has No balm for my healing, There I find comfort, And there I am blest.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Under His wings, O what precious enjoyment! There will I hide till Life's trials are o'er; Sheltered, protected, No evil can harm me; Resting in Jesus I'm safe evermore.
